titleStmt.title: SII 7.724: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 724. (A.R. No. 101 of 1902). ON A PILASTER ON THE LEFT OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastasurāsuramastakamakuṭāṁ
śujāḷajaḷadhautapadaṁ prastuta jinēṁdraśāsanamastu
ciraṁ bhadramakhiḷabhavyajanānāṁ . dhareyeṁbaṁbujami¨rppu
du saradi sarōvarada naḍuve ka¨rnnikevolu maṁdarami
¨rppudalli maṁdaragiriyiṁdaṁ teṁkaleseva bharatakṣē
tra . Ā bharatakṣētradoḷu cāḷukya cakrēśvarara vaṁśā
vatāradoḷ . Age negevaṁdadiṁdogeda rāṣṭrakumā
rakaraṁ poraḷci koṁdagaṇitavāda pe¨rmmege tava¨rmma
neyāgi caḻakyaranvayaṁ negaḷe negaḷteyaṁ taḷedu taṁ
naya tējadoḷāṇeyōleyuṁḍige sale sādhya
vāda nelanaṁ taḷedaṁ nṛpamēru tailapaṁ . Aṁtu janatāsaṁ
stutanāda tailana magaṁ satyāśrayaṁ taṁnṛpāḷana
putraṁ vibhuvikramaṁ tadanujaṁ śrīyayyaṇō
¨rvvīśa nātana taṁmaṁ jayasiṁha nātana magaṁ trai
ḷōkyamalla kṣitīśanenippāhavamalla nātana ma
gaṁ sōmēśvarō¨rvvīśvaraṁ . tatsahōdaraṁ . śrī
matribhuvanamalla niḷāmahitaṁ nahuṣapṛthu
bhagīrathacaritaṁ bhūmaṁḍaḷamaṁ sakaḷāśā
maṁḍaḷamavadhiyappinaṁ sādhisidaṁ . tatputraṁ .
ninagēkacchatramakkī bhuvanabhavanamī lōkadāyu
ṣyamellaṁ ninagakkanyāvanīpāḷaka ratibhayadiṁ tamma
sa¨rvvasvamaṁ tettu nijaśrīpādapadmakkeṟa
gugepiriduṁ prītiyiṁ viśvadhātrījanamaṁ bhū
lōkamallakṣitipati dayeyiṁ rakṣi sācaṁdratāraṁ ©
© khyātastraividyāparanāmā śrīrāmacaṁdramuni
tiḷakaḥ pṛyaśiṣyaḥ traividyaprabhēṁdubhaṭṭārakō
lōkē . jinapatimatatatvaruci¨rnnayapramā
ṇapravīṇaniśitamatiḥ . parahita caritrapātrō
babhau prabhācaṁdra yatināthaḥ . prabhācaṁdramunīṁdrasya
mukhacaṁdrasya caṁdrikā . vidvajjana manōjāta(ḥ) khēda
tāmasahāriṇī . munibṛṁdārādhyanī baṁdane kuma
tamatadhvaṁsanī baṁdanī baṁdane vādībhēṁdrakaṁṭhīrava nakhi
ḷaguṇagaṇōddāmanī baṁdanī baṁdane cā¨rvvākādivādipra
karamele manōga¨rvvamaṁ tōṟadi¨rmmāṇenutuṁ traivi
dyanī baṁdane guṇagaṇadhāmaṁ prabhācaṁdradēvaṁ © ©
© bhuvanāśca¨ryyamenalke māḍisida rīlōkaṁ guṇaṁgo
ḷvinaṁ divijēṁdrā¨rccita śāṁtināthajinapa śrīgēhamaṁ
dal mahōtsavadiṁ mērunagēṁdracaityagṛhadiṁ mēleṁbi
naṁ śāṁtinātha viśiṣṭāgraṇi ba¨rmmadēvavibhugaḷsamya
ktvaratnākarar . mattaṁ . ninagabhivṛddhiyakke śubhamakke
śubhōdayamakke puṇya makkanupamalakṣmiyakke
jayamakkajarāmara makke puṇyabhājanavaraśāṁ
tināthajinapādapayōruhabhṛṁgasajjanānanamuku
ruṁdabhavyajanabāṁdhava saddvijavaṁśabhūṣaṇā . Aṁba
ramaṁ paḷaṁcaleḷutiḻdapudikkida kōṭi nāgalōkaṁbara veyde
muṭṭidudagaḷda tta diśādiśāṁtarāḷaṁ barameyde
gu¨rvenalke sēḍiṁbadoḷetti
mastakaśūla mallamē . Aṁbudhi mēredappi kavi
dhareyaṁkoḷuvaṁdu viṣṇuvaṁśaṁ berasī jagatrayamumaṁ
basiṟoḷnilisiḷdu kāvavōliṁbaḷidiḻda nāldeseya nā
ḍugaḷaṁ peṟagikki kāva sēḍiṁbada vipraroṁdaḷavanēvo
gaḷveṁ caladaṁkarāmara . Ēṁdoreya ¨rssēḍiṁbada nāḍeya
bāvannavīraroḷmaccaradiṁ kāduvarā¨rkkāṁcīpuravadanapa
ṭutarakavāṭapuṭavighaṭanaroḷ . suraruṁ daitya
rumabdhiyaṁ kaḍevuti¨rppaṁdugraśēṣāhi bhīkarakōpāgra
hi kāḷakoṭaviṣamaṁ tuppeṁdaḍā dēvaruṁ suraruṁ bhītiyi
nōḍuvaṁdu giriśaṁ kāvaṁdadiṁ kādarī dhare keṭṭōḍuva kāla
daṁdu palaraṁ sēḍiṁbadu¨rggādhipar . śaraṇeṁdu mūṟu
lōkaṁ bageyiṁ kaikoṁḍu kāva mahimāspadaroḷ śa
raṇāgatapaḍipaṁjara . raraviṁdōdarana doreyarī
mūnū¨rvvar . todaḷē nī dha¨rmmamaṁ rakṣisidanavan dī
¨rghāyuvārōgyamu¨rvīviditaprakhyāti vaṁśōnnati ma
dananibhākāramavyākuḷaṁ śrīsudatīnāthatvamiṁtī
bhavadoḷeseguvalliṁ baḷikke surēṁdrā doḷmūḍi
ttalpogaḷalaṟiyenā neyde
Digital edition of SII 7.724 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
